results.rendered_html: 2. arāya (wie eben) m. ˚yī f. Unhold, Unholdin, Bezeichn. einer Gattung von Dämonen: arāyebhyo jighatsubhya imaṃ me pari rakṣata  AV. 8,2,20 . arāyā~ asya muṣkābhyāṃ bhaṃsaso apa hanmasi 6,4 . 5 . arāyamasṛkpāvānaṃ yaśca sphātiṃ jihīrṣati 2,25,3 . ye gandharvā apsaraso ye cārāyāḥ kimīdinaḥ 12,1,50 . 11,6,16 . 16,6,7 . fem.  NIR. 6,30 . arāyyaṃ brahmaṇaspate tīkṣṇaśṛṅgodṛṣanniha  ṚV. 10,155,2 . 1 . asau yo adharādgṛhastatra santvarāyyaḥ  AV. 2,14,3 . apamṛjya yātudhānānapa sarvā arāyyaḥ 4,18,8 . 7 . 1,28,4 . 4,17,5 .

arāya a. [nāsti rādhanaṃ yasya vede ṣacsamāsaḥ]
1 Devoid of wealth, without sacrificial gifts.
2 Stingy, niggardly.
— yaḥ, -yī Any malignant or evil spirit.
